categories.label: UPI / Payment App Fraud
categories.description: Fraud involving UPI apps (PhonePe, Google Pay, Paytm) via fake QR codes, collect requests, or PIN theft.

categories.label: Vishing (Voice Call Impersonation)
categories.description: Voice calls pretending to be bank officials, police, or government agents to steal OTPs or sensitive info.

categories.label: Phishing (Fake Links/Websites)
categories.description: Deceptive links via SMS/Email leading to cloned websites to steal login credentials or card details.

categories.label: Investment / Trading Scam
categories.description: Fraudulent schemes promising high returns via fake crypto, stocks, or task-based apps on Telegram/WhatsApp.

categories.label: Sextortion / Blackmail
categories.description: Blackmail involving intimate video recordings or morphed images shared on social media.

categories.label: Online Shopping / E-commerce Fraud
categories.description: Fake websites selling items that are never delivered, or receiving empty/fake products.

categories.label: Job / Recruitment Fraud
categories.description: Fake job offers demanding 'registration fees', 'laptop security', or 'training charges'.

categories.label: Social Media Impersonation / Hacking
categories.description: Hacking social media accounts or creating fake profiles to borrow money from friends/family.

categories.label: Ransomware / Malware Attack
categories.description: Encryption of computer files by malicious software demanding a ransom for the decryption key.

categories.label: SIM Swapping
categories.description: Fraudsters obtaining a duplicate SIM card of your number to gain access to OTPs and bank accounts.

categories.label: Romance / Dating Scam
categories.description: Fraudsters feigning romantic interest on dating apps to trick victims into sending money or gifts.

categories.label: Lottery / KBC / Prize Fraud
categories.description: Fake messages claiming you won a lottery or KBC prize and asking for 'processing fees'.

categories.label: Aadhaar Enabled Payment System (AePS) Fraud
categories.description: Unauthorized withdrawal of money from bank accounts using biometric details and Aadhaar number.
